hero.title: Thanks for installing Webapp Boiler 2025
hero.subtitle: You're ready to launch a modern React + Express experience.
hero.message: We packed opinionated structure, theming, and testing helpers so you can focus on features. Tweak the settings below and make it yours.

steps.title: Review UI configuration
steps.description: Edit configuration/ui.config.json to choose the skin, theme mode, and supported languages that match your product.

steps.title: Run both servers
steps.description: Use pnpm dev (or npm run dev) to start Vite on port 5173 and the Express API on port 2000.

steps.title: Ship your first feature
steps.description: Add UI in components/pages and wire API routes in server/src/routes to bring your idea to life.
